authorization_scope: Defines all requirements for legal provider, odds source, or market data integration. No provider is authorized until all checklist items are satisfied and signed artifact is present.
legal_provider_authorization_requirement: Provider must be legally authorized (e.g. Taiwan Sports Lottery, MLB official)
Authorization artifact (contract, license) must be present in repo before any integration
provider_contract_requirements: Scope of data usage and allowed markets must be explicit
data_license_requirements: Explicit data license required for all odds/market data
License must cover all intended use cases
market_coverage_requirements: Must cover: moneyline_winner, run_line_handicap, total_runs_over_under, first_five_innings_if_supported_later, unsupported_market_placeholder
All markets must be individually authorized
odds_access_method_requirements: Only official API or authorized data feed allowed
Scraping forbidden unless explicitly authorized in writing
source_trace_requirements: All records must include provider_id, fetch_time, market_id
audit_log_requirements: All data access and ingestion must be logged
Audit logs must be retained for compliance review
data_retention_requirements: Retention policy must be defined in contract
No indefinite storage without legal basis
security_and_secret_handling_requirement: No credentials, secrets, or auth URLs in repo
All secrets must be managed via secure vault, never hardcoded
compliance_review_requirements: All provider integrations must pass legal and compliance review before activation
blocked_until_authorized_items: All odds ingestion, storage, computation, recommendation, and production use are BLOCKED until all checklist items are satisfied and signed artifact is present
allowed_future_actions: Begin integration only after all legal, license, and compliance gates are satisfied
prohibited_actions: No odds fetching, storage, ingestion, computation, or recommendation until authorized
No credentials, secrets, or auth URLs in repo

market_authorization_matrix.allowed_access_method: Official API or legally authorized data feed only
market_authorization_matrix.allowed_future_action: Authorize with signed contract and compliance review
market_authorization_matrix.prohibited_action: Any odds ingestion, storage, computation, or recommendation until authorized
